name: Sadaf Table Lamp - 10.5 Inch Height - TBL4292 - Brass/White - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Sadaf table lamp, a stunning blend of modern design and classic elegance. With its brass and white finish, this lamp adds a touch of sophistication to any room. Standing at 10.5 inches, it is compact yet impactful. Crafted with 60 percent iron for the body and a 40 percent marble base and neck, this lamp is both sturdy and stylish. The E26 socket provides functional lighting for your space. Whether on a desk, bedside table, or in a living room, the Sadaf table lamp enhances your decor effortlessly. Embrace the balance of iron and marble to bring an artful accent to your home. Ideal for those who appreciate subtle elegance and practical design, this table lamp is a beautiful addition to any setting.
